subfolders.description: Active vision document and current OKRs
Quarterly planning session notes and outcomes
Prior year vision docs and annual reviews

domains.description: Life vision document, 1-year and 5-year goals, values statement, and life design principles
Quarterly OKRs and goal tracking — objectives, key results, current status, and progress notes
Monthly 13-domain life scorecard history — career, health, wealth, relationships, personal growth, content, home, business, travel, mental/mind, learning, social, vision/purpose
Calendar vs. priorities gap analysis — time allocation actuals vs. targets by life area
Quarterly planning session notes, retrospective summaries, and next-quarter OKR drafts
